Just download and try
Its so simple in concept yet a bit interesting
Wow! this is a amazing experience for the go and gear vr and i look forward to more content being added soon. love it!  URGENT: The app is not updating on my s6 edge plus??

Wow! this is a amazing experience for the go and gear vr and i look forward to more content being added soon. love it!  UPDATE: I didnt receive the new update v1.1.41 for gear vr s6 edge plus guys, any help here?

developer_response.body: Hello, We're looking into this now. There haven't been any other reported issues with updating to 1.1.41, so we're trying to reproduce the issue and will get back to you shortly.

reviews.review_description: Really really great!

The developers seem to have changed their business model.  The app is slicker, but also harder to use.  Some experiences are still accessible, but most  now require creating an account and unlocking with credits.  (Credits are earned by doing tasks, not purchased with money.)  Unfortunately, they want a fair amount of personal info when creating an account, which I’m not willing to provide.  The app is fairly pushy about creating an account, so I won’t be using this as a demo to others any longer. Original review is below.

Mixed Bag
Ignoring its stated purpose of changing your emotional state, this is a collection of mini experiences.  Some you’ll find fun; some you’ll find pointless or boring, but there’s something for everyone.  Some are fun enough to keep me coming back, and to use them when I’m demoing my Oculus Go to others.

Thanks a lot for this app! A really good idea and an ideal practical use for a VR system like the Oculus Go! Nicely done and smart to collect data about the emotional state of mind directely within the app. 

What I lke too, is that it seems to be running in 72 hz mode. That's something that is essential for me, because I am sensitive to the strong flickering in bright 60 hz scenes and it's something that is often done wrong with apps for the Go which want to help you to relax.

Thanks again!  Looking forward to see new "pillars" appear :-) !

It is a new world , for relaxing , higher mood , change attitude  and more !    But acheiving credit has some problems and needs to re-thinking by developer .
The best part is AWE section , DESCENT !  ......  it is great .

reviews.review_title: Most definitely new horizons for VR
reviews.review_description: Just love this  - more, more, more please
Found them to be all meditative.  Love the butterfly one.  Would be cool if Galaxy used the hand controller to track.

For some reason. It tries to sign in but is unable too meaning I can't use the app at all on my Oculus go. I don't wanna give a 1 star rating cause I'm sure that the issue can be fixed. I just don't know how without help

developer_response.body: Hi Brandon - apologies for this. This was a server issue that has now been fixed.

reviews.review_description: Pretty decent. I enjoy the calming feature the best. Very immersive and relaxing.

I am not a fan of intense games in vr or 2d. If it has zombies or any shooting, I'm out. I'm a fan of relaxation videos, but sometimes I find myself getting bored with them if I've seen them before. Luminol satisfies me because the activities are low key. There is no goal and I'm not trying to compete with others or increase my performance. The scenes are visually pleasant, and the speed of the experience is on the slower side. The activity is different for each experience, but if I had to suggest a real world comparison, I would say maybe it is like throwing a dog a stick and watching the dog catch it and bring it back. Not physically strenuous, but very satisfying.
This made me feel all kinds of emotions, it managed to do what it said it would. I got bored after an hour though as there is not much to do. I would love it if they were to add more.

developer_response.body: Hi CogisEggNog - thanks for the feedback! Please keep checking in as we will be adding new content regularly and will be doing a major upgrade of the app in the coming months.

reviews.review_description: This is an amazing experience with gorgeous imagery except that in my experience as a hypnotist, the breathing Pace is so much faster than I teach my clients that I found it too distracting to use. If you could slow down the pace or allow the user to adjust the breathing pace this would be an awesome app.
Beta tester for Samsung running updated os One UI android 9.0. This app won't install.

I typically choose the blue wall experience (relaxation).  Each experience is different, but as a whole this game really relaxes me.  When i feel like punching my neighbor in the face for being loud, or after being stuck in traffic due to old Canadians and moron drivers  I just choose the blue wall and off to relaxationville.  Thanks guys!
Looks lit can’t wait to play
I really enjoy this app. Both the sections have great experiences. My favorite are the interactive experiences. Can’t wait for more to release.
